beats.directive: Decompose the prompt into Q1 (how can meta-score connect to maestro), Q2 (what to remove), Q3 (per-field utility for the 9 named fields), plus the upstream gating question: does maestro need reproducibility of meta-score artifacts?

In: tools/meta-score/, tools/symphony/types.ts, tools/symphony/persistence.ts, tools/symphony/algorithms/, .github/agents/maestro*.agent.md, prompt and fixture files. Out: UI, plugins, market-data. Verify (do not assume) the meta-score-maestro separation by grepping maestro agent files for meta-score imports/symbols.

Per field (tempo, beats, frequencyMap, schemaVersion, fingerprintProblem, generatedFrom, computeScoreId, level, instrument): definition site, write sites, read sites. Read sites include maestro agent files as consumers explicitly, plus prompts.ts, fixtures, and persistence.

Open: definition in types.ts, the meta-score producer code path, persistence.ts round-trip, at least one fixture, prompts.ts, and every maestro consumer site located in step 3. No hypothesizing maestro's data appetite — read it.

Per field, draw producer -> persistence -> consumer chain. Tag consumers as {meta-score-only, maestro, both, none}. Note the provenance cluster (computeScoreId + schemaVersion + fingerprintProblem + generatedFrom) as a unit.

For each field with consumer=none, actively look for indirect uses (string keys, JSON paths, prompt interpolation). For the provenance cluster, test the joint claim: any of these has a live consumer under maestro.

Per field: keep-as-is / rewire-to-maestro / rename / remove / unresolved. Provenance cluster gets a single joint verdict gated on the upstream reproducibility question — not four independent verdicts.
Per-field table (field, producer, consumer, maestro consumer, verdict, rationale). Explicit answer to Q1 (concrete connection points), Q2 (removal list), Q3 (per-field utility). Mark open decisions.
Tag follow-ups by target template: renames -> refactor; new wiring -> feature; the provenance/reproducibility decision -> decide; anything genuinely unresolved -> another investigate.
